title: Product and Sum of digits

content.problemStatement:
Given an integer **N**, Calculate and print the **sum** and **product** of its digit.


Input Format

The first and only line of input will contain a single positive integer NNN <= 109.


Output Format

Print the sum and product of digits of NNN on single line with a space between them.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each of the next T lines contains a single integer N (0 ≤ N ≤ 10^9).
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print two integers separated by a space: the sum of the digits of N and the product of the digits of N. Print each test case result on its own line.

sampleTestCases.explanation: The only test case has N = 22. Digits are 2 and 2. Sum = 2+2 = 4, Product = 2*2 = 4.

solution.approach: For each test case we iterate over the decimal representation of N digit by digit. While extracting digits we maintain two accumulators: sum (initially 0) and product (initially 1). The special case N = 0 is handled separately because the loop would be skipped; for N = 0 both sum and product are 0. The algorithm runs in O(number of digits) per test case, which is at most 10 for the given constraints, and uses O(1) extra space.
solution.timeComplexity: O(D) per test case, where D is the number of digits of N (D ≤ 10). Overall O(T * D).

tcGeneratorPython:
def generate_case(i, RINT, POWER):
    # i: test case index (0‑based) up to 20
    if i == 0:
        t = 1
        print(t)
        print(0)
    elif i == 1:
        t = 1
        print(t)
        print(1)
    elif i == 2:
        t = 1
        print(t)
        print(5)
    elif i == 3:
        t = 1
        print(t)
        print(9)
    elif i == 4:
        t = 1
        print(t)
        print(1000000000)
    elif i == 5:
        t = 1
        print(t)
        print(999999999)
    elif i == 6:
        t = 1
        print(t)
        print(2147483647)
    elif i == 7:
        t = 1
        print(t)
        print(123456789)
    elif i == 8:
        t = 1
        print(t)
        print(22222)
    elif i == 9:
        t = 1
        print(t)
        print(333333)
    elif i == 10:
        t = 1
        print(t)
        print(12345)
    elif i == 11:
        t = 1
        print(t)
        print(54321)
    elif i == 12:
        t = 1
        print(t)
        print(101010)
    elif i == 13:
        t = 1
        print(t)
        print(100000000)
    elif i == 14:
        t = 1
        print(t)
        print(999999998)
    elif i == 15:
        t = 1
        print(t)
        print(2)
    elif i == 16:
        t = 5
        print(t)
        for n in [12,34,56,78,90]:
            print(n)
    elif i == 17:
        t = 3
        print(t)
        for n in [999999999,123456789,1000000000]:
            print(n)
    elif i == 18:
        t = 10
        print(t)
        for n in range(10):
            print(n)
    elif i == 19:
        t = 2
        print(t)
        print(111111111)
        print(222222222)
